extensions: Bag and fare conditions depend on the return flight

hotels.name: Casa Rosa All Women's Hostel Miami

plan.reasoning: Selected Flight 0 (Frontier round-trip at $335) as it offers the best value - significantly cheaper than the American Airlines direct flights ($432) while still getting you to Miami on the first day. The layover in Atlanta is reasonable at 3.6 hours. For accommodation, chose Casa Rosa All Women's Hostel Miami at $114 total (2 nights) - it has the best rating (4.2) among budget options and includes useful amenities like free Wi-Fi. Total cost is $449 ($335 flights + $114 hotel), well within the $900 budget with $451 remaining for meals and activities during the 2-day trip.
plan.final_message_to_user: Great news! I've found an excellent combination for your Chicago to Miami trip (July 17-19) that costs just $449 total - leaving you $451 for food, activities, and fun! You'll fly Frontier with one stop in Atlanta, and stay at Casa Rosa All Women's Hostel Miami, which has a solid 4.2 rating and free Wi-Fi. This gives you maximum flexibility to enjoy Miami's beaches, nightlife, and cuisine without breaking the bank!
